Notes: CSP erases 30-26 SSU lead with 18-2 run late in the first half and early
second half...First double-digit loss at home for SSU since 1999...SSU now
has three home losses, most since 1999-2000...SSU will host Winona State on
Saturday...CSP at Wayne State on Saturday.
Game.Officials: Jeff Sylliaasen,  Roger Neal,  Jr.,  Kent Otte
